code: import React,{useState}from"react";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function MessageForm(_ref){let{onSend}=_ref;const[text,setText]=useState("");const[files,setFiles]=useState([]);const[sending,setSending]=useState(false);const quickEmojis=["😀","😂","😍","🔥","👍","🎉"];const addEmoji=emoji=>setText(prev=>"".concat(prev).concat(emoji));const submit=event=>{event.preventDefault();if(!text.trim()&&!files.length)return;setSending(true);Promise.resolve(onSend({content:text,files})).then(()=>{setText("");setFiles([]);}).finally(()=>setSending(false));};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{className:"message-form",onSubmit:submit,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"message-input-wrap",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",placeholder:"Type your message here...",value:text,onChange:event=>setText(event.target.value),maxLength:1000}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"emoji-quick-row",children:[quickEmojis.map(emoji=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"button",className:"emoji-btn",onClick:()=>addEmoji(emoji),children:emoji},emoji)),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("label",{className:"file-picker-btn",children:["Attach",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"file",multiple:true,onChange:event=>setFiles(Array.from(event.target.files||[]).slice(0,5))})]})]}),files.length?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("small",{className:"attach-hint",children:files.map(file=>file.name).join(", ")}):null]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"primary-btn",type:"submit",disabled:sending,children:sending?"Sending...":"Send"})]});}
